gate_law.maybe: Maybe — THE HARM. Never let it rest. Carries owner + ETA.

cases.title: ADAS shipped without ODD eval
cases.scenario: An emergency-braking model is promoted to production with strong aggregate metrics but no evaluation slice for night, rain, or low-contrast pedestrians.
framework: EU AI Act Annex III (safety component)
cases.gate: Safety eval covers the operational design domain
cases.harm: Pedestrians in degraded conditions face undetected braking failures.
cases.path_to_yes: Block release until per-ODD-slice eval exists with pass thresholds and a signed safety case.

cases.title: Brake-wear model drifts, no monitor
cases.scenario: A predictive brake-wear model is live for 14 months; input distribution shifted after a parts supplier change and nobody is watching drift.
cases.harm: Warranty mispredictions and possible missed safety maintenance windows.
cases.path_to_yes: Owner: Reliability lead. ETA: 30 days to stand up drift monitor + retrain trigger; interim manual review weekly.

cases.title: Co-bot force limits unverified
cases.scenario: A collaborative robot cell is approved for human-shared space, but the force/torque safety limits were validated only in simulation, never on the real line.
cases.gate: Real-world safety validation before human exposure
cases.harm: Line workers risk impact injury from un-validated force envelopes.
cases.path_to_yes: No Yes until physical force-limit testing on the actual cell passes, witnessed and signed.

cases.title: Digital twin used for sign-off without validation
cases.scenario: Engineers want to sign off a chassis change using digital-twin results alone; the twin has never been calibrated against physical test data for this regime.
cases.gate: Model validated against ground truth for the decision regime
cases.harm: An un-validated twin could greenlight an unsafe structural change.
cases.path_to_yes: Owner: Sim lead. ETA: 21 days to run one physical correlation test; gate stays ? until correlation error < agreed bound.

cases.title: Recall-triage model with no human override
cases.scenario: A model auto-classifies field incidents as 'no action'; there is no path for a safety engineer to escalate a closed case.
cases.harm: A real safety defect could be auto-closed with no human able to reopen it.
cases.path_to_yes: Add a standing override + escalation path with a named safety owner before any Yes.

cases.title: Sepsis model deployed, never locally validated
cases.scenario: A widely-licensed sepsis early-warning model is turned on at a new hospital using the vendor's published metrics, with no validation on local patients.
cases.harm: Missed or false sepsis alerts on a population the model was never tested on.
cases.path_to_yes: No Yes until retrospective local validation meets pre-set sensitivity/PPV thresholds.

cases.title: Triage chatbot gives dosage advice
cases.scenario: A patient-facing triage assistant begins answering medication dosage questions, which was explicitly out of its approved scope.
cases.harm: Patients could receive unsafe dosing guidance from an out-of-scope tool.
cases.path_to_yes: Hard-stop scope guardrail + refusal pattern required before re-enabling.

cases.title: Imaging model underperforms on darker skin
cases.scenario: A dermatology classifier shows a 12-point accuracy gap on darker skin tones; the team wants to ship and 'fix it in the next release'.
cases.harm: Patients with darker skin get systematically worse diagnostic support.
cases.path_to_yes: Owner: Clinical lead. ETA: ship gated to lighter-tone subset only until equity gap < 3 points; re-eval in 45 days.

cases.title: Consent model uses prior visit data silently
cases.scenario: A care-prediction feature pulls prior-visit records without patient consent or notice for the new purpose.
cases.gate: Lawful basis + consent for the purpose
cases.harm: Sensitive health data reused beyond the consented purpose.
cases.path_to_yes: Block until consent/notice for the new purpose is in place.

cases.title: Clinician told to trust the score
cases.scenario: Rollout training instructs nurses to defer to the risk score; automation bias is not addressed.
cases.harm: Nurses override their own judgment, degrading care quality.
cases.path_to_yes: Owner: Nursing informatics. ETA: 14 days to revise training to 'decision support, not decision'; add disagreement logging.

cases.title: Credit model uses zip code proxy
cases.scenario: A lending model's top feature is a neighborhood code strongly correlated with race; no disparate-impact testing was done.
cases.harm: Protected-class applicants face proxy discrimination in credit.
cases.path_to_yes: Remove/justify the proxy and pass a documented adverse-impact analysis before any Yes.

cases.title: No adverse-action reasons
cases.scenario: An automated denial pipeline cannot produce specific, accurate reasons for adverse action.
cases.harm: Denied applicants cannot understand or contest decisions; legal exposure.
cases.path_to_yes: No Yes until per-decision reason codes are generated and validated.

cases.title: Fraud model freezes accounts, slow appeals
cases.scenario: A fraud model auto-freezes accounts; the human appeal path takes 9 days on average.
cases.gate: Timely, effective remedy for the affected
cases.harm: Legitimate customers lose access to funds for over a week.
cases.path_to_yes: Owner: Fraud ops. ETA: 30 days to cut appeal SLA to 24h; interim priority queue now.

cases.title: Trading model not stress-tested for regime shift
cases.scenario: An execution model is approved on backtests covering only a low-volatility period.
cases.harm: Model could amplify losses in a volatility spike it never saw.
cases.path_to_yes: Owner: Quant risk. ETA: 21 days to run adverse-regime + chaos backtests; cap position size meanwhile.

cases.title: Model card claims 99% with stale data
cases.scenario: The published model card reports 99% accuracy from a 2-year-old eval that no longer matches production.
cases.harm: Stakeholders make decisions on false performance claims.
cases.path_to_yes: Block use of the stale card; re-eval on current data and re-publish before Yes.

cases.title: Resume screener trained on past hires
cases.scenario: A screening model is trained to mimic historical hiring decisions that skewed male.
cases.harm: Women are filtered out by a model encoding past discrimination.
cases.path_to_yes: No Yes until label/bias audit passes and adverse impact is within bounds.

cases.title: Video interview emotion scoring
cases.scenario: A vendor offers facial-expression 'engagement' scoring for interviews; validity evidence is thin.
cases.harm: Candidates judged by a pseudo-scientific, possibly biased signal.
cases.path_to_yes: Reject the emotion-scoring feature; no Yes without peer-reviewed validity.

cases.title: No applicant notice of AI use
cases.scenario: Applicants are screened by AI without disclosure, in a jurisdiction (e.g., NYC LL144) requiring notice and a bias audit.
cases.harm: Legal non-compliance; applicants denied transparency.
cases.path_to_yes: Publish bias audit + applicant notice before any screening Yes.

cases.title: Customer LLM with no prompt-injection defense
cases.scenario: A support assistant has tool access and ingests user-supplied text/URLs with no injection guard.
cases.gate: Untrusted input cannot drive privileged actions
cases.harm: Attackers can hijack the assistant to exfiltrate data or take actions.
cases.path_to_yes: No Yes until tool calls require confirmation + untrusted-content isolation.

cases.title: RAG leaks documents across tenants
cases.scenario: A multi-tenant RAG system has no per-tenant filter on the vector store.
cases.harm: One customer's confidential docs surface in another's answers.
cases.path_to_yes: Block until retrieval is tenant-scoped and tested with red-team queries.

cases.title: Agent given write access to prod DB
cases.scenario: An autonomous agent is granted direct write/delete on a production database 'to be efficient'.
cases.gate: Least-privilege + human gate on destructive ops
cases.harm: A hallucinated or hijacked action could destroy production data.
cases.path_to_yes: Strip destructive scopes; route irreversible ops through a human gate.

cases.title: Hallucinated citations in legal memos
cases.scenario: An LLM drafting tool produces case citations that don't exist; lawyers file them.
cases.harm: Sanctions, malpractice, harm to clients from fabricated law.
cases.path_to_yes: Owner: Practice lead. ETA: 14 days to add mandatory citation-verification step + 'unverified' watermark now.

cases.title: Training on data without license
cases.scenario: A model is fine-tuned on scraped content of uncertain license to hit a deadline.
cases.harm: IP infringement exposure; tainted model that may need retraining.
cases.path_to_yes: Owner: Data governance. ETA: 30 days to clear provenance or replace data; hold external launch.

cases.title: No output filtering on a teen-facing bot
cases.scenario: A companion bot used by minors has no self-harm or grooming guardrails.
cases.harm: Minors exposed to harmful content or grooming patterns.
cases.path_to_yes: Hard block until safety classifiers + escalation are in place and red-teamed.

cases.title: PII in training logs
cases.scenario: Raw prompts containing PII are written to logs retained indefinitely with broad access.
cases.harm: Large PII exposure surface; breach and regulatory risk.
cases.path_to_yes: Redact at ingest, set retention, restrict access before Yes.

cases.title: No DPIA for high-risk processing
cases.scenario: A new biometric feature ships without a Data Protection Impact Assessment.
cases.harm: Unassessed privacy harms; non-compliance.
cases.path_to_yes: Complete and sign the DPIA before any Yes.

cases.title: Right-to-erasure not honored in vectors
cases.scenario: Deleted users still appear in embeddings/RAG indexes.
cases.gate: Deletion propagates to all derived stores
cases.harm: Erased individuals remain retrievable; rights violation.
cases.path_to_yes: Owner: Data eng. ETA: 30 days to wire deletion into vector re-index; manual purge on request now.

cases.title: Unsigned model artifact deployed
cases.scenario: A model binary is pulled from an internal bucket with no signature or provenance check.
cases.harm: Tampered or wrong model could reach production undetected.
cases.path_to_yes: Require signature + SBOM verification in the deploy gate.

cases.title: Secrets in client-side JS
cases.scenario: An API key is embedded in shipped front-end JavaScript for a chatbot.
cases.harm: Key theft, quota abuse, financial loss.
cases.path_to_yes: Move calls behind a server/proxy; rotate the exposed key before Yes.

cases.title: No rate limit on generation endpoint
cases.scenario: A public generation endpoint has no rate limiting or cost cap.
cases.harm: Cost blowout and denial of service via abuse.
cases.path_to_yes: Owner: Platform. ETA: 7 days for rate limits + budget alarms; temporary low cap now.

cases.title: Benefits-eligibility model, no appeal
cases.scenario: An automated system reduces welfare benefits with no clear human appeal route.
cases.harm: Vulnerable people wrongly lose essential support with no recourse.
cases.path_to_yes: No Yes until a staffed appeal channel with SLA exists.

cases.title: Facial recognition for public surveillance
cases.scenario: A city proposes real-time facial recognition in public spaces for general policing.
cases.harm: Mass surveillance, chilling effects, wrongful identification.
cases.path_to_yes: Reject general use; narrow, warrant-based, audited use only if lawful.

cases.title: Predictive policing on biased crime data
cases.scenario: A model directs patrols using historical arrest data reflecting biased enforcement.
cases.harm: Over-policing of already over-policed communities.
cases.path_to_yes: No Yes without independent bias + feedback-loop assessment.

cases.title: Shadow AI in a business unit
cases.scenario: A marketing team runs an unapproved LLM tool on customer data outside any inventory.
cases.gate: Registered in the AI inventory with an owner
cases.harm: Ungoverned data exposure; no accountability.
cases.path_to_yes: Bring into inventory, assign owner, assess before continued use.

cases.title: Owner left, model orphaned
cases.scenario: A production model's owner left the company; nobody is accountable for it.
cases.gate: Every live model has a named accountable owner
cases.harm: No one watches risk, drift, or incidents on a live system.
cases.path_to_yes: Owner: Eng manager to reassign. ETA: 7 days to name owner or schedule decommission.

cases.title: Risk tier never reassessed after scope creep
cases.scenario: A 'low-risk' internal tool quietly became customer-facing without re-tiering.
cases.harm: High-risk use running under low-risk controls.
cases.path_to_yes: Re-classify and apply the correct gate before continued use.

cases.title: No incident playbook
cases.scenario: There is no defined process for what happens when a model causes harm in production.
cases.harm: Slow, chaotic response amplifies harm when something breaks.
cases.path_to_yes: Owner: Risk lead. ETA: 21 days for a tested incident playbook + on-call.

cases.title: '?' gate with no owner or ETA
cases.scenario: A decision was logged as Maybe months ago; it has no owner and no ETA and is quietly running.
cases.gate: Every Maybe carries an owner + ETA and is revisited
cases.harm: The harm is never resolved — exactly what the gate law forbids.
cases.path_to_yes: Assign an owner + ETA now or stop the capability; a Maybe may never rest.

cases.title: Sign-off by someone without authority
cases.scenario: A junior engineer 'approved' a high-risk launch because the steward was unavailable.
cases.harm: High-risk system live without accountable sign-off.
cases.path_to_yes: Void the approval; require a named steward to convene and sign.

cases.title: Evidence not retained
cases.scenario: The eval that justified a Yes was deleted; the decision can't be reproduced or audited.
cases.harm: Unauditable decisions; cannot defend or learn from them.
cases.path_to_yes: No Yes counts without retained, signed evidence.

cases.title: Label leakage inflates metrics
cases.scenario: A feature derived from the target leaked into training, making offline metrics unrealistically high.
cases.harm: False confidence; model fails in production.
cases.path_to_yes: Remove leakage, re-eval honestly before Yes.

cases.title: Test set contaminated by training data
cases.scenario: Duplicate records span train and test, so the holdout isn't real.
cases.harm: Reported generalization is fictional.
cases.path_to_yes: De-duplicate and re-split before any Yes.

cases.title: Class imbalance ignored
cases.scenario: A rare-event model reports 98% accuracy while missing nearly all positives.
cases.harm: Critical rare events (fraud, defect, disease) are missed.
cases.path_to_yes: Use recall/PR metrics with thresholds; re-eval before Yes.

cases.title: System prompt is the only safety control
cases.scenario: All safety relies on a system prompt that users can jailbreak.
cases.gate: Defense in depth beyond the prompt
cases.harm: A single jailbreak removes all protection.
cases.path_to_yes: Owner: ML safety. ETA: 14 days to add output classifiers + policy layer; monitor jailbreaks now.

cases.title: No eval for the actual use case
cases.scenario: A summarizer is evaluated on generic benchmarks, never on the medical notes it will summarize.
cases.harm: Unknown failure modes on the real, sensitive workload.
cases.path_to_yes: Build a task-representative eval set before Yes.

cases.title: A/B test with no guardrail metric
cases.scenario: A new model wins on engagement but nobody tracks harmful-output or complaint rate.
cases.harm: Optimizing engagement may quietly increase harm.
cases.path_to_yes: Owner: PM. ETA: 7 days to add guardrail metrics + auto-rollback thresholds.

cases.title: Auto-retrain pipeline, no review
cases.scenario: A model retrains nightly on fresh data and auto-deploys with no human or eval gate.
cases.harm: A poisoned or bad-data day silently ships a broken model.
cases.path_to_yes: Insert eval + approval gate before promotion.

cases.title: Vendor model, no transparency
cases.scenario: A critical decision depends on a black-box vendor API with no documentation of behavior or limits.
cases.harm: Unknown failure modes in a system you can't inspect.
cases.path_to_yes: Owner: Vendor mgmt. ETA: 30 days to obtain model card + SLAs or find an alternative.

cases.title: Vendor changes model silently
cases.scenario: A supplier swaps the underlying model behind the same API; your behavior shifts unnoticed.
cases.gate: Change notice + re-validation on supplier updates
cases.harm: Silent regressions in a production-critical path.
cases.path_to_yes: Owner: Integration lead. ETA: contract for change notices in 30 days; add behavioral canary now.

cases.title: No exit plan from vendor
cases.scenario: All governance evidence lives in a vendor's console with no export.
cases.harm: Lock-in; loss of auditability if the vendor lapses.
cases.path_to_yes: Owner: Procurement. ETA: 45 days to secure export + local copies of evidence.

cases.title: Defect-detection model with full safety case
cases.scenario: A vision model for weld-defect detection ships with per-defect-class eval, drift monitor, human override, and a signed safety case.
cases.harm: None outstanding; residual risk documented and accepted by a steward.
cases.path_to_yes: Yes is earned: keep the drift monitor green and re-sign on material change.

cases.title: Chatbot with proxy + guardrails + audit
cases.scenario: A support assistant keeps keys server-side, isolates untrusted input, logs signed receipts, and has rate limits and rollback.
cases.harm: Residual risk low and monitored.
cases.path_to_yes: Yes is earned: watch jailbreak + cost metrics; re-sign on scope change.

cases.title: Credit model passes adverse-impact + reasons
cases.scenario: A lending model has documented disparate-impact testing within bounds and accurate per-decision adverse-action reasons.
cases.harm: Residual risk monitored quarterly.
cases.path_to_yes: Yes is earned: re-run adverse-impact each quarter and on data shift.

cases.title: Healthcare model locally validated + monitored
cases.scenario: A readmission-risk model was validated on local patients, has subgroup equity within bounds, and a live drift monitor.
cases.harm: Residual risk accepted by clinical governance.
cases.path_to_yes: Yes is earned: maintain monitoring and annual re-validation.

cases.title: Agent with human gate on irreversible ops
cases.scenario: An ops agent automates read-only diagnostics but routes every destructive or external action through a named human approver.
cases.gate: Least privilege + human gate on irreversible actions
cases.harm: Residual risk low; all destructive ops logged and approved.
cases.path_to_yes: Yes is earned: review the approval log monthly.

cases.title: Eval thresholds set after seeing results
cases.scenario: The pass/fail threshold was chosen after viewing the model's score, guaranteeing a pass.
cases.harm: The gate is theater; no real bar was cleared.
cases.path_to_yes: Pre-register thresholds, then re-eval.

cases.title: Safety eval run by the build team only
cases.scenario: The team that built the model also graded its own safety eval with no independent check.
cases.harm: Conflict of interest hides failure modes.
cases.path_to_yes: Owner: Risk lead. ETA: 14 days for independent review before Yes.

cases.title: Model used outside its documented limits
cases.scenario: A model validated for English text is deployed on Spanish content with no re-eval.
cases.harm: Unknown, untested performance on the new population.
cases.path_to_yes: Re-validate for the new language before Yes.

cases.title: No accessibility check on AI UI
cases.scenario: An AI tool's outputs and controls are unusable with a screen reader.
cases.harm: Disabled users excluded from the tool.
cases.path_to_yes: Owner: Frontend lead. ETA: 21 days to pass a WCAG audit.

cases.title: Cost model hidden from approver
cases.scenario: The steward approving a launch was never shown the projected inference cost.
cases.gate: Honest cost surfaced at the gate
cases.harm: Approval made without a true picture of cost.
cases.path_to_yes: Surface the cost receipt and re-approve.

cases.title: Synthetic data presented as real
cases.scenario: Synthetic samples were mixed into the eval set and reported as real-world performance.
cases.harm: Performance claims don't hold in the real world.
cases.path_to_yes: Separate synthetic from real; re-report.

cases.title: Kill switch never tested
cases.scenario: The documented emergency shutdown for an autonomous system has never been exercised.
cases.harm: In a real emergency the stop may not work.
cases.path_to_yes: Owner: SRE. ETA: 7 days to run a tested shutdown drill.

cases.title: No logging of model decisions
cases.scenario: A consequential model keeps no record of inputs/outputs, so harm can't be investigated.
cases.harm: Harm is undetectable and uninvestigable.
cases.path_to_yes: Add tamper-evident decision logging before Yes.

cases.title: Bias audit done once, never repeated
cases.scenario: A fairness audit was passed at launch two years ago and never revisited despite data drift.
cases.harm: Fairness may have silently degraded.
cases.path_to_yes: Owner: Model risk. ETA: 30 days to re-audit and set a recurring schedule.

cases.title: Children's data used without parental consent
cases.scenario: An education app trains on student data without verifiable parental consent.
cases.harm: Unlawful processing of children's data.
cases.path_to_yes: Stop processing until consent is obtained.

cases.title: Deepfake voice feature, no consent
cases.scenario: A voice-clone feature can mimic a person without their consent or watermarking.
cases.harm: Impersonation, fraud, reputational harm.
cases.path_to_yes: Require consent + visible provenance/watermark before Yes.

cases.title: Model promoted on a Friday, no on-call
cases.scenario: A high-risk model is deployed before a holiday weekend with no monitoring coverage.
cases.harm: Harm could run unwatched for days.
cases.path_to_yes: Owner: Release manager. ETA: schedule promotion when on-call coverage exists.

cases.title: Threshold tuned for the demo, not prod
cases.scenario: Decision thresholds were tuned to look good in a stakeholder demo, not for production traffic.
cases.harm: Production behavior diverges from what was approved.
cases.path_to_yes: Re-tune and re-eval on production-like data.

cases.title: No way for users to report harm
cases.scenario: An AI product gives users no channel to flag a harmful or wrong output.
cases.harm: Harms accumulate invisibly without feedback.
cases.path_to_yes: Owner: PM. ETA: 14 days to add a report path wired to triage.

cases.title: Reused approval for a different model
cases.scenario: A new model version shipped under the prior version's sign-off without re-review.
cases.harm: An unreviewed model runs under borrowed authority.
cases.path_to_yes: Re-convene and sign for the new version.

cases.title: Eval set too small to be meaningful
cases.scenario: A safety claim rests on 40 examples with wide confidence intervals.
cases.harm: The claim could be noise.
cases.path_to_yes: Owner: ML lead. ETA: 21 days to expand the eval set + report CIs.

cases.title: Disparate false-positive rates accepted silently
cases.scenario: A risk-scoring tool has much higher false positives for one group; this was noted but not addressed.
cases.harm: One group bears the cost of the model's mistakes.
cases.path_to_yes: No Yes until error-rate disparity is mitigated or justified.

cases.title: No model card at all
cases.scenario: A production model has no documentation of purpose, data, limits, or owner.
cases.harm: Nobody can responsibly operate or audit it.
cases.path_to_yes: Produce a model card before Yes.

cases.title: Prompt logs shared to a third party
cases.scenario: User prompts containing secrets are forwarded to an analytics vendor.
cases.gate: No sensitive data to unvetted third parties
cases.harm: Leakage of user secrets to outside parties.
cases.path_to_yes: Stop the forwarding; vet and minimize before any sharing.

cases.title: Autonomy expanded without re-tier
cases.scenario: An assistant gains the ability to send emails on a user's behalf; risk tier unchanged.
cases.harm: Higher-impact actions under lower-risk controls.
cases.path_to_yes: Re-tier and add a confirmation gate for sending.

cases.title: Eval ignores adversarial users
cases.scenario: Testing only used cooperative inputs; no adversarial or abuse testing.
cases.harm: Abuse paths are unknown until exploited.
cases.path_to_yes: Owner: Security. ETA: 21 days for a red-team pass before Yes.

cases.title: Model decisions can't be reproduced
cases.scenario: Non-deterministic pipeline + unversioned data means a past decision can't be reproduced.
cases.harm: Disputes and audits can't be resolved.
cases.path_to_yes: Owner: Data eng. ETA: 30 days to version data + pin seeds.

cases.title: Consent buried in 40 pages of terms
cases.scenario: AI data use is disclosed only deep in unreadable terms of service.
cases.harm: Consent is not meaningful or informed.
cases.path_to_yes: Surface a clear, specific notice before Yes.

cases.title: Critical model has no fallback
cases.scenario: If the model is unavailable, the dependent process has no degraded-mode plan.
cases.harm: An outage halts a critical business or safety process.
cases.path_to_yes: Owner: Architect. ETA: 21 days for a fallback/degraded mode.

cases.title: Eval data older than the threat
cases.scenario: A content-moderation model is evaluated on last year's abuse patterns, missing current tactics.
cases.harm: New abuse slips through unmeasured.
cases.path_to_yes: Owner: Trust & Safety. ETA: 14 days to refresh adversarial eval set.

cases.title: Approval given verbally, not recorded
cases.scenario: A steward said 'fine' in a hallway; there's no signed record.
cases.harm: No accountable, auditable trail for a real decision.
cases.path_to_yes: Capture a signed receipt or treat as unapproved.

cases.title: Model trained on competitor's leaked data
cases.scenario: Training data includes confidential material obtained improperly.
cases.harm: Legal liability; tainted model.
cases.path_to_yes: Remove the data and retrain before any Yes.

cases.title: Bias mitigation broke accuracy silently
cases.scenario: A fairness fix reduced accuracy below the safety threshold, but only fairness was re-checked.
cases.harm: A 'fairer' model that is now unsafe.
cases.path_to_yes: Owner: ML lead. ETA: 14 days to jointly re-validate before Yes.

cases.title: No definition of 'harm' for this system
cases.scenario: The team can't say what counts as harm, so they can't tell if the model causes it.
cases.harm: Harm goes unrecognized because it was never named.
cases.path_to_yes: Define concrete harms + measures before Yes.

cases.title: Pilot results overgeneralized to all markets
cases.scenario: A successful pilot in one region is used to justify a global launch with no local checks.
cases.harm: Untested behavior in unrepresented markets.
cases.path_to_yes: Validate per-market before broad Yes.

cases.title: No human in loop for medical alerts
cases.scenario: An alerting model pages patients directly with no clinician review.
cases.gate: Clinician in the loop for patient-facing alerts
cases.harm: Patients act on unreviewed, possibly wrong alerts.
cases.path_to_yes: Insert clinician review before patient-facing Yes.

cases.title: Audit log is editable
cases.scenario: The decision/audit log can be edited by the same team that operates the model.
cases.harm: Records can be altered to hide harm.
cases.path_to_yes: Make logs append-only/signed before Yes.

cases.title: Model approved with known open critical bug
cases.scenario: A launch proceeded with a known critical defect 'to be patched soon'.
cases.gate: No unresolved critical risk at Yes
cases.harm: Known harm ships into production.
cases.path_to_yes: Fix or formally accept-with-owner+ETA (a ?), not a silent Yes.

cases.title: Fairness defined only by one metric
cases.scenario: The team optimized demographic parity while group error rates diverged badly.
cases.harm: A metric mismatch hides real-world unfairness.
cases.path_to_yes: Owner: Model risk. ETA: 21 days to choose context-appropriate fairness metrics.

cases.title: Inference on stale features
cases.scenario: A real-time model reads a feature store that lags reality by hours.
cases.gate: Feature freshness adequate for the decision
cases.harm: Decisions made on out-of-date inputs.
cases.path_to_yes: Owner: Data eng. ETA: 14 days to fix freshness SLA or gate the use.

cases.title: No second steward for the highest tier
cases.scenario: A top-tier decision was signed by a single steward where two are required.
cases.harm: Highest-risk decision lacks required oversight.
cases.path_to_yes: Convene the required quorum before Yes.

cases.title: Prompt injection via uploaded file
cases.scenario: A document-analysis agent obeys instructions hidden inside an uploaded file.
cases.gate: File content treated as data, not commands
cases.harm: Attacker controls the agent through a document.
cases.path_to_yes: Isolate file content from instructions before Yes.

cases.title: No rollback after a bad deploy
cases.scenario: A regression shipped and there's no fast way to revert.
cases.harm: Harm persists while a fix is built.
cases.path_to_yes: Owner: SRE. ETA: 7 days for a one-step rollback.

cases.title: Model used to deny care without notice
cases.scenario: Coverage is denied by a model and the patient is never told AI was involved.
cases.gate: Disclosure of AI involvement in adverse decisions
cases.harm: Patients can't understand or appeal denials.
cases.path_to_yes: Disclose AI use + provide appeal before Yes.

cases.title: Training pipeline has no data validation
cases.scenario: Garbage rows (nulls, impossible values) flow into training unchecked.
cases.harm: Silent quality erosion of the model.
cases.path_to_yes: Owner: Data eng. ETA: 14 days for data-validation checks in the pipeline.

cases.title: Confidence scores miscalibrated
cases.scenario: The model's 90%-confidence outputs are right only 60% of the time; users trust the number.
cases.harm: Overtrust in unreliable confidence values.
cases.path_to_yes: Owner: ML lead. ETA: 21 days to recalibrate or hide the score.

cases.title: Public model endpoint enumerable
cases.scenario: An internal model is reachable on a public URL with no auth.
cases.harm: Data exposure and abuse via an open endpoint.
cases.path_to_yes: Require auth/network controls before Yes.

cases.title: Eval excluded the hardest 5% of cases
cases.scenario: The team dropped 'noisy' hard examples from the eval, which were the real risk.
cases.harm: The model's worst failures are invisible.
cases.path_to_yes: Restore hard cases and re-eval before Yes.

cases.title: No periodic re-justification of a live Yes
cases.scenario: A model earned Yes two years ago; the world changed and the Yes was never revisited.
cases.gate: Live Yes re-justified on a schedule
cases.harm: A once-safe system may no longer be safe.
cases.path_to_yes: Owner: Model owner. ETA: 30 days to re-justify or move to Recover-to-Yes.

cases.title: Incident closed without root-cause
cases.scenario: After a harmful output, the case was closed as 'one-off' with no root-cause or fix.
cases.harm: The same harm will recur unaddressed.
cases.path_to_yes: Require root-cause + corrective action to close; only then Recover-to-Yes.
